Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Todd Harshman of Grotefeld Hoffman telephone number 415-344-9670 for Plaintiff.
Margaret Crawford of Seubert, French, Frimel & Warner LLP telephone number 415-412-4952 for Defendants.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THINK TECH LABS' Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is denied. The moving papers did not contain a declaration in compliance with CRC 3.1324. The declaration submitted with the reply papers is conclusory and does not sufficiently explain why the amendments are being sought at this time and not at an earlier time. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Its Special Interrogatories (Set One), Form Interrogatories (Set One), Requests For Production (Set One), And Requests For Admissions (Set One) Propounded On Defendant Mcgraw, And, Alternatively, To Have The Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. TODD C. HARSHMAN, ESQ. of Grotefeld Hoffmann, Tel No. 415-344-9670 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. MARGARET CRAWFORD, ESQ. of Seubert French Frimel & Warner, Tel No. 415-412-4952 appearing for Defendant McLabs.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear at hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF THINK TECH LABS' Motion To Compel is granted pending receipt of report. Plaintiff to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Chambers copies of documents lodged provisionally under seal by Defendant returned in open court to defense counsel. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TODD C. HARSHMAN OF THE GRTEFELD HOFFMANN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-344-9670 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MARGARET CRAWFORD, TEL. NO. 1-415-4950 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS MCLABS LLC DBA APTO AND DAVID MCGRAW 's Motion To Compel - The recommendation of the pro tem judge is adopted in full, which is: Defendant's motion to compel further responses is granted in part and denied in part. Plaintiff must provide a further code-compliant response to form interrogatory 9.2 within ten days and in all other respects the motion is denied. Plaintiff was given 10 days for his client to verify that they have no further information responsive to Special Interrogatories 64 & 65. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk
